description: Have fun choosing from a collection of sneakers from gas. Comfy and stylish, this pair is worth adding in your wardrobe as it also doubles up as a perfect lifestyle footwear when teamed with jeans and tees. Upper Synthetic leather upper with fabric lining and suede covered toe, mid and heel cup for structural comfort Padded tongue and collar with a central lace-up system for snug Fit and comfort Cushioned sockliner for in-step cushioning Removable footbed to accomodate an orthotic Rubber toe box and heel for protection Midsole Eva midsole for responsive cushioning and shock absorption Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Brand badge on back heel for style Outsole Durable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for maximum grip and traction shoe care Do not store in direct sunlight Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth   FRO04091 FRO04121 FRO04171
